content: Reconciliation component status rules: restored (tmux alive AND worktree exists), degraded (one present/missing), missing (both absent), skipped (completed sessions not evaluated). Process liveness via isProcessRunning() uses process.kill(pid, 0) safe check. Reconciliation report includes operator actions: missing agents → ov sling, degraded agents → ov inspect. Overall status: restored (all active=restored), partial (any degraded/missing), failed (errors).
